title: Senior SEO Specialist at Meesho South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at Meesho South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Meesho South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a SEO Specialist for our Noida operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Meesho South Asia Partners:
Meesho South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meesho South Asia Partners!
